config.script:
#include "50200" 'qxx_publication #include "50217" 'realize publication #include "50518"
class cn5dokmag_oper_config public m_strName public m_cCreateTask public m_cKolektor
public m_eTypRej
public m_idObjDPC_1 public m_idObjDPC_2 public m_cDrukEtykiet
public sub class_initialize() m_strName = "" m_cCreateTask = "0" m_cKolektor = "0" m_idObjDPC_1 = 0 'no DP to perform m_idObjDPC_2 = 0 'no DP to perform m_cDrukEtykiet = "0" end sub
public property get is_empty() is_empty = (m_cCreateTask = "0") and _ (m_idObjDPC_1 = clng(0)) and _ (m_idObjDPC_2 = clng(0)) and _ (m_cKolektor = "0") and _ (m_cDrukEtykiet = "0") end property
public sub load_from_string(byref strConfig) dim aItems : aItems = split(strConfig, vbTab) if ubound(aItems) > 2 then m_strName = aItems(0) m_cCreateTask = left(aItems(1),1) m_idObjDPC_1 = clng(aItems(2)) m_idObjDPC_2 = clng(aItems(3)) end if
'compability mode - db6 :-) if ubound(aItems) > 3 then m_cKolektor = left(aItems(4),1) end if if ubound(aItems) > 4 then m_cDrukEtykiet = left(aItems(5),1) end if end sub
public function save_to_string save_to_string = doc_.afc.convert.formatter("%1"+vbTab+"%2"+vbTab+"%3"+vbTab+"%4"+vbTab+"%5"+vbTab+"%6") _ (m_strName)(cstr(m_cCreateTask))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_1))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_2))(cstr(m_cKolektor))(cstr(m_cDrukEtykiet)).done() end function
public sub show_config_page dim pPage : set pPage = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=THIS_FILE")
pPage.topelement.title = "Konfiguracja operacji """ + m_strName + """"
pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_TASK).value = m_cCreateTask pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_KOLEKTOR).value = m_cKolektor pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_DRUK_ETYK).value = m_cDrukEtykiet
'todo: otwieranie i wybór
dim strPubType : strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_ZLEC_PROD"
setup_choose_dpc_pic pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW,CTRLID_DPC_1,m_idObjDPC_1,strPubType setup_choose_dpc_pic pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW,CTRLID_DPC_2,m_idObjDPC_2,strPubType setup_choose_dpc_label pPage,CTRLID_DPC_1,abs(m_idObjDPC_1) setup_choose_dpc_label pPage,CTRLID_DPC_2,abs(m_idObjDPC_2) setup_choose_dpc_preview pPage , CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW , m_idObjDPC_1 setup_choose_dpc_preview pPage , CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW , m_idObjDPC_2
if pPage.domodalauto() = CMD_CHOICE then m_cCreateTask = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_TASK).value m_idObjDPC_1 = get_choosen_dpc(pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW) m_idObjDPC_2 = get_choosen_dpc(pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW) m_cKolektor = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_KOLEKTOR).value m_cDrukEtykiet = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_DRUK_ETYK).value end if end sub public sub perform_operation(byref pObject , byref pPage) perform_operation_on_config Me, pObject , pPage end sub end class
class cn5dokmag_dok_config private m_aOperations(COUNT_OPERATIONS_INX) public m_eTypRej
public function is_empty(byval nNumOper) dim pOperConf:set pOperConf = m_aOperations(nNumOper) is_empty = pOperConf.is_empty end function
public sub class_initialize() dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS set m_aOperations(i) = new cn5dokmag_oper_config next end sub
public sub setTypeRej(eTypRej) m_eTypRej = eTypRej dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS m_aOperations(i).m_eTypRej = m_eTypRej next end sub
public sub init_with_defaults(nTypRej) dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS set m_aOperations(i) = new cn5dokmag_oper_config next
setTypeRej nTypRej
m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk zlecenia" 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 end sub
public sub load_from_string(byref strConfig) dim aItems : aItems = split(strConfig, REJDOK_CONG_SEPARATOR) dim i dim last : last = ubound(aItems) if last > COUNT_OPERATIONS then last = COUNT_OPERATIONS end if for i = 0 to last m_aOperations(i).load_from_string aItems(i) next end sub
public function save_to_string dim strTotal : strTotal = "" dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS strTotal = strTotal + m_aOperations(i).save_to_string() + REJDOK_CONG_SEPARATOR next save_to_string = strTotal end function
public property get operation_name(byval nOperNr) operation_name = m_aOperations(nOperNr).m_strName end property public property let operation_name(byval nOperNr,byref strName) m_aOperations(nOperNr).m_strName = strName end property
public sub show_config_page(byval nOperNr) m_aOperations(nOperNr).show_config_page end sub public sub perform_operation(nOperNr,byref pObject,byref pPage) #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "DEBUG: " + cstr(operation_name(nOperNr)) #endif m_aOperations(nOperNr).perform_operation pObject , pPage end sub end class
function create_config_object(byref pRejestr) dim pNewConfig : set pNewConfig = new cn5dokmag_dok_config pNewConfig.setTypeRej pRejestr.eTyp set create_config_object = pNewConfig end function
'--------------------------- config page ------------------ function fok page_.result = CMD_CHOICE page_.goback end function
function fcancel page_.goback end function
'--------------------------- perform operation ------------------ private sub perform_operation_on_config(byref pConfig,byref pDokMag , byref pPage)
if not doc_.getmodule(60183).make_task_on_dokmag(pConfig.m_cCreateTask,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not doc_.getmodule(60183).make_publication_on_dokmag(pConfig.m_idObjDPC_1,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not doc_.getmodule(60183).make_publication_on_dokmag(pConfig.m_idObjDPC_2,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not FillFromCollector(pConfig.m_cKolektor,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not drukuj_kody_kreskowe(pConfig.m_cDrukEtykiet,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
end sub
private function drukuj_kody_kreskowe(cWypelnij,byref pDokMag , byref pPage) : drukuj_kody_kreskowe = true
'u60194 if cWypelnij = "0" then exit function end if
drukuj_kody_kreskowe = false
dim oProdukt dim oNXArrayIdobj : set oNXArrayIdobj = nx_.new_array() dim oNXArrayIlosc : set oNXArrayIlosc = nx_.new_array()
dim poz_dok for each poz_dok in pDokMag.listPozycje set oProdukt=poz_dok.pProdukt oNXArrayIdobj.add oProdukt.idobj oNXArrayIlosc.add CLng(poz_dok.curIloscOpak) next dim pM60313 : set pM60313 = doc_.getmodule(60313) #ifdef _CONTRANS pM60313.przekaz_checkBoxa_nazwIndeksow_obcych(pPage.ctrl(18).value) 'przekaz inf. czy jest wcisniety korzystaj z nazw/indeksow obcych #endif pM60313.uruchom oNXArrayIdobj,oNXArrayIlosc,pDokMag
end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function FillFromCollector(cKolektor, byref pZlec, byref pPage) FillFromCollector = doc_.getmodule(60194).FillFromCollector(cKolektor, pZlec, pPage) end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_ALL,Konfiguracja,FORM_SPAN)
QXX_CHOOSE_PUBLICATION(CTRLID_DPC_1,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW,1)
QXX_CHOOSE_PUBLICATION(CTRLID_DPC_2,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW,1)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2) QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_KOLEKTOR,,Kolektor danych) QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_DRUK_ETYK,,Wydruk etykiet) QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
#comment NEXTVERSION - wywalic hide
QXC_LABEL(Zdarzenia,1)
zapamiętaj zdarzenie
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN) QXF_END
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
